theme_notes: Touchstones: Trump declaring Iran's ceasefire response 'totally unacceptable'; deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship evacuated to the Canary Islands; PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final (Budapest, May 30); The Devil Wears Prada 2; David Attenborough's 100th birthday; Taylor Swift and fiancé Travis Kelce.
settled: Balanced like a ceasefire on day two. Something's about to happen.
The hantavirus cruise ship had worse numbers than this. Small mercies.
Attenborough turned 100 with zero outstanding debt. Evolutionary advantage.
youOwe: Trump found Iran's offer 'totally unacceptable.' Your tab: similar energy.
Less than a hantavirus ship souvenir. Still not a great look.
PSG spent this on a single sock. You can't even match that.
David Attenborough narrated more dignified situations than this one.
The cruise ship hit the Canary Islands faster than your Venmo reply.
A ceasefire that expires before your debt does. Classic you.
Iran's negotiators showed up. You're still in the group chat draft.
Devil Wears Prada 2 opening weekend. You're the fashion emergency.
Enough to quarantine on the hantavirus boat in mild comfort.
Taylor Swift and Kelce had a date night in London. You have this tab. Not the same.
Champions League final seats. You owe that much and aren't attending.
Trump declared Iran unacceptable. He's seen your Venmo history now.

PSG's transfer budget has a smaller gap between want and reality than you.
Iran's war reparations are unresolved. You're in good company. Terrible company.
Meryl Streep would wear this number as a brooch and still look down on you.
theyOwe: Attenborough has documented kindness more expensive than this gesture.

A symbolic gesture. Like a Putin handshake. Warm. Means nothing.
Less than Taylor Swift's pre-show dinner. Your partner has adjusted expectations.

Canary Islands quarantine rates per day. Context helps. Slightly.
The Devil Wears Prada 2 ticket plus concessions. They saw it alone. On you.
A hazmat crew's hourly rate. Your partner owes you that energy.

Arsenal final tickets, nosebleeds. That's the respect level here.
Kelce proposed to Swift. Your partner owes you roughly this. Start there.
Hantavirus treatment isn't cheap. Neither is this relationship.
Attenborough's been patient for 100 years. You've been patient for six weeks.
PSG's wage bill for a squad player. Your partner thinks they're a bench option.
This is Iran-deal-era significant. Someone should be sanctioned.
At this point you're a creditor state. Demand your own foreign policy.
